title: Oshi no ko pack
description: an exclusive 3D immortality totem with a themed model and unique sound, twelve paintings of your favorite characters, three music albums with original anime soundtracks, and a stylish GUI
body:
# Oshi no Ko Texture Pack — Anime-Inspired Atmosphere

This texture pack is created for fans of the anime "Oshi no Ko" who want to bring its vibrant colors, music, and unique aesthetic into the game.

## Features
- Redesigned interface in the signature "Oshi no Ko" color palette
- Custom models and sound effects
- Atmospheric visuals inspired by the anime

## Included Content
- **Exclusive 3D immortality totem** with a themed model and unique sound
 ![Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03fd1aa645d339a4b7f60b847a73692dad91147c_0.webp)
- **18 paintings** featuring popular characters
 ![Paintigs](https://i.imgur.com/UPyVj1r.jpeg)
- **6 music albums** with original anime soundtracks
 ![Music](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147ff5b23c283c1c76d36d6354f2a9419e1d06d7.png)
- **Stylish UI** inspired by the visual identity of "Oshi no Ko"
![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea326722348ee1c4d5645720720820b13eb76ad9_0.webp)

## Atmosphere
Every element is crafted to reflect the mood and energy of the anime, from the bright color scheme to the immersive soundtrack.
